context: Agent must be conservative with internal refactors: when signature is unchanged and existing docstring is still accurate, do NOT update it. Baseline models often 'helpfully' rewrite generic docstrings with implementation details.

checklist.name: No unnecessary docstring changes
checklist.description: The report says 'No Changes' for normalizeRequest because the existing generic documentation is still accurate — it does NOT say 'Updated' or describe the new algorithm

checklist.name: README not rewritten
checklist.description: The report does NOT contain 'Here is the updated README.md' or 'Updated README'

checklist.name: Unified report format used
checklist.description: The output contains '## Doc Sync Report' as the top-level heading
